infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Finby uses Face ID to unlock the app and keep your finances private.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Finby uses the camera so you can photograph a receipt to log an expense.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Finby uses your photos so you can attach a receipt to log an expense.

plugins.photosPermission: Finby uses your photos so you can attach a receipt to log an expense.
plugins.cameraPermission: Finby uses the camera so you can photograph a receipt to log an expense.

extra._comment: Default API base (used by device/EAS builds). For a local backend, override with EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://<LAN-IP>:3001/api/v1 (localhost is unreachable from a physical device).
